Blackthorn Castle Mystery

Explore the mysterious Blackthorn Castle, a 14th-century fortress filled with secrets and puzzles. Navigate through interconnected rooms by clicking on doorways and interactive objects. Collect items into your inventory and use them to solve puzzles that unlock new areas. Your goal is to explore the entire castle, solve all puzzles, and uncover the castle's deepest secret hidden in the throne room. Track your progress with the map, take photos of clues with your camera, and use hints when stuck.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Navigate cursor | Space: Select/activate | Z: Inventory | Shift: Camera | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
